! Title: Tiny fixture for lexer integration tests
! Source: hand-crafted subset of real EasyList shapes
[Adblock Plus 2.0]

! --- network block rules ---
||ads.example.com^
||doubleclick.net^$third-party
||googlesyndication.com/pagead/$script,domain=example.com|foo.com
/banner_ads/*
||tracker.net^$~third-party,domain=~allowed.com

! --- network exceptions ---
@@||good.example.com^
@@||partner.com^$image,domain=example.com

! --- cosmetic element-hide (universal + scoped) ---
##.ad-banner
##div[id^="adslot-"]
example.com,sub.example.com##.sponsor-box
news.site##aside.promo

! --- cosmetic exceptions ---
example.com#@#.sponsor-box

! --- extended (procedural) cosmetic ---
example.com#?#.container:has(> .ad)

! --- CSS/script inject, HTML filter ---
example.com#$#body { overflow: auto !important; }
example.com#%#+js(set-constant, adblockDetected, false)
example.com##^script:has-text(googletag)
